cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.body: We use cookies to improve performance, security, and analytics. We will not set optional cookies until you accept.

terms.title: DreamCatcher.AI – Terms of use
terms.intro: We want you to feel safe. Here’s a short explanation of what is allowed, how sharing works, and user responsibility.

sections.title: 1. Fair use
sections.body: The service is only for managing dreams and personal interpretations. Do not use it commercially or share other users’ content without consent.

sections.title: 2. Privacy
sections.body: We protect the personal data users share, but avoid posting identifying information or very sensitive content.

sections.title: 3. Personal responsibility
sections.body: DreamCatcher.AI does not replace professional advice. Every decision made following an interpretation is solely the user’s responsibility.

sections.title: 4. Terms updates
sections.body: We will update these terms from time to time. We’ll notify in advance, and continued use counts as agreement to the updated version.

terms.footer: Using the service means you agree to all terms, including data retention, notifications, and removal of harmful content.

loginPage.title: Log in to continue your dream journey
loginPage.subtitle: Quick access to your saved dreams, personal notes, and messages waiting for the next moment.
highlights: Access all dreams and saved interpretations
Exclusive articles and content to open heart and mind
Control tools to manage your long-term dream journey
loginPage.formSubtitle: Enter details to continue exploring your dreams and insights.

registerPage.title: Create a new account and get emotional support through your dreams
registerPage.subtitle: DreamCatcher.AI combines daily journaling, AI, and calming content to help you understand the messages hidden in your dreams and turn them into growth.
benefits: Smart dream interpretation with AI that speaks your language.
Personal dream journal that detects emotional patterns and returns practical insights.
Short calming tools, meditations, and breathing for gentle sleep.
registerPage.formSubtitle: Fill in your details; we'll guide you to calm and deeper insights.
registerPage.termsNote: By clicking “Sign up” you agree to the terms of use and privacy policy.

signup.passwordHint: Stronger passwords include upper/lowercase letters and numbers.
signup.termsSubtitle: You must read and accept the terms before creating an account.

journal.emptyTitle: Your smart journal appears after the first dream
journal.emptyBody: After you save a few dreams, we will surface recurring patterns, rising themes, and reflection questions.
journal.noThemes: There are not enough categorized dreams yet to identify a clear recurring pattern.

insights.light: This is a good start. Insights will get sharper after a few more saved dreams.
insights.topCategory: The most recurring theme is {{category}}, appearing in {{count}} dreams.
insights.risingCategory: {{category}} appears more in the recent period, up by {{delta}} versus the previous period.
insights.streak: You logged dreams for {{count}} consecutive days around your latest entry.
insights.moreActive: You logged more dreams in the recent period than in the previous one.
insights.noRecent: No dreams were added recently. A short journal check-in can help reveal new patterns.
insights.keepWriting: Your journal is starting to reveal a rhythm. A few more entries will make the patterns clearer.

prompts.category: What might {{category}} be pointing to in this period?
prompts.pattern: Which emotion kept returning, even when the dream story changed?
prompts.nextDream: Next time I write a dream, what small detail do I want to remember?

privacy.title: How we protect your data
privacy.intro: Privacy matters to us. You decide what to share about your dreams, and we will not share anything beyond what you approve.

sections.title: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: We collect only what’s needed to run the platform: username, email, dreams you choose to share, and anonymous usage data to improve performance. Data is stored securely and encrypted.

sections.title: 2. Choice, sharing, and removal
sections.body: You can choose not to share private dreams, delete interpretations, or cancel your account at any time. Requests to access, correct, or delete data are handled within a reasonable time.

sections.title: 3. Storage and security
sections.body: Alongside internal access limits, we only provide information that aligns with the law. Even after closing an account we keep only essential data for security and compliance.

account.title: My details
account.subtitle: Update your name and image; the email is read-only.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Final action: all data linked to your account will be deleted permanently. This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmText: I confirm deleting the account permanently.
delete.success: Account deleted successfully. See you again if you choose!
delete.error: Error deleting account. Please try again later.
